summary: Comprehensive backend API testing completed for Safe-Spend escrow and spending-control API. All 40 tests passed covering: Authentication (JWT & API keys), Escrow Management (CRUD, fund, pause/resume), Spending Policies (limits, vendor allowlist, approval thresholds), Spend Requests with Rules Engine (auto-approve, deny scenarios, pending approval, idempotency), Approvals API (list, approve, deny), Balance endpoint, Audit Log, Webhooks CRUD, and Error Handling.

minor.issue: First request returns 201, replay returns 200 - different status codes but same ID (idempotency works correctly, just inconsistent status codes)

tests: Create policy with all limits (per-tx, daily, monthly)
Auto-approved spend under threshold ($15 to Anthropic)
Denied spend - over per-tx limit ($99.99 > $50 limit)
Idempotency check - same idempotency_key returns same ID
Deny spend request with note (balance unchanged)
Agent key can access balance endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints are working correctly with proper authentication
Rules engine correctly evaluates spend requests against policies
Audit logging is comprehensive and captures all operations
Idempotency is working correctly (same ID returned for duplicate requests)
Error handling returns appropriate HTTP status codes
seed_data_creation: Created test user: test_comprehensive@test.com, multiple test escrow accounts, policies, spend requests, and webhooks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive backend API testing completed with 100% pass rate. Test user created: test_comprehensive@test.com / TestPass123!. All major API flows tested: Auth, Escrow CRUD, Policies, Spend Requests with Rules Engine, Approvals, Audit Log, Webhooks, Error Handling. The rules engine correctly handles: auto-approve under threshold, deny blocked vendors, deny over per-tx limit, deny insufficient balance, deny paused accounts, pending approval above threshold, and idempotency.
